name: validate_trident_signal
description: Validates the current MCF and Trident signals against confidence scores and noise thresholds. Input: { "wiv_z": number, "bav_z": number, "icv_z": number, "confidence": number }

name: query_personal_history
description: Retrieves the full longitudinal history of a specific marker for the patient. Input: { "patient_id": "string", "marker_name": "string" }

name: compute_vascular_anomaly_score
description: Computes a deep-dive Vascular Anomaly Score (VAS) based on ICV components. Input: { "nlr": number, "plr": number, "rar": number }

name: generate_triage_dossier
description: Generates a clinical-grade markdown dossier summarizing the investigation. Input: { "investigation_summary": "string", "risk_level": "string" }

name: escalate_to_oncologist
description: Routes the final dossier to an oncologist for review. Input: { "dossier_content": "string", "urgency": "string" }
